CustomField.description: Copied from the related Question Template during Job Setup. Controls whether system includes the Question & Response in the Validation or Internal Interview Summary fields. 'No' prevents the Question from ever being added to an email template. 'Yes' forces inclusion (Validation) or includes if a Response is present (Internal Interview).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Yes, Response will be submitted to the client if present. No, Response will never be sent to the Client.
CustomField.label: Available for Submittal
